title: Gender and World War II
subtitle: Chapter 8 reading, split into four study sections
note: Text-only version. Audio is not included in this package.

sections.title: Global Context
sections.description: Great Depression, World War II, fascism, welfare states, and global shifts in gender relations.

sections.title: Japan
sections.description: Japanese feminism, wartime mobilization, diaspora, empire, home front, and gendered wartime ideology.

sections.title: China
sections.description: War of Resistance, sexual violence, women’s work, wartime culture, family change, and Yenan.

sections.title: Korea
sections.description: Colonial mobilization, wartime domesticity, heavy industry, and the comfort women system.
